reviews.review_description: Everyone should give this a shot
I want more comics in english. I use this with oculus go. please more comics. I will buy the books for my collection. is there any link for oculus go ?
Love the vr anime

Keeps with the typical hand drawn style (no 3d renders) but uses both 360 and 3d depth to great effect. It still feels like a comic but you're inside the stories. Some interaction as well.

3 stories already released and one more scheduled to release shortly (at the time of writing).
This is excellent. Stories download quickly, design and presentation is excellent. Great concept. Simple but very effective. Well done developers!

OMG this is the best thing ever , I really realy really love it it deserve more recognition and woow am so amazed I think more people should join and download this pr help right comic too if they can cause woow wooow woooow 
Thank you soo much
This is very cool and immersing. Can't wait to have more books
Think about options (a)

reviews.review_title: App is good but there is few cartoon
reviews.review_description: Developer, did you quit doing your project?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your interest in the service. Last year, I signed an official contract with a Korean telecommunication company and have been providing more than 200 VR webtoons content for limited use in Korea since April 2019. I am very happy to inform you that I have been able to present my hard-created content to my service. There are new episodes every week. I hope to have an opportunity with global telecommunication company to serve the English version of content in the future. Thank you again for your interest.

reviews.review_description:
Now whoever came up with this idea is absolutely genius. I've never been so engrossed in a comic book of my life. I can't wait to see what else you have in-store I've only read one story so far. I've decided to support Oculus by creating a Facebook page link to their homepage. If you are bored and you have the time please check it out. Hopefully someday they will sponsor me. Here is a link to the page.

https://www.facebook.com/WizeNflew/
Virtual portal for eight comic books. TRT 20 min.
please add a sword art online comic! :)

The stories are short. Don't expect half an hour to an hour of reading. You won't get it here. But overall it is an amazing way to view comics. This is the future of technology. The developer is headed in the right direction with this one. If the comics were longer and more comic selections could be made available, I can see this being even better.
Really unique idea, the "comics" are really neat, albeit short. And HOLY MOLY that one horror comic was the scariest thing I've seen on Gear VR
Need more comics!

This is a great app. The experiences are great both in terms of story and in vr tech. There aren’t that many English stories yet but there are a lot of additional ones only in korean. These can still be fun to look at as the artwork is very detailed.

Definitely worth a download. Will go back through these again and look forward to more from the developer in the future

reviews.review_title: Best comic experience of all time
reviews.review_description: Wow, I got blown away when the comic book became alive. This is the most compelling 2D story-telling I've seen in years. Please, more contents!! I'll gladly pay for it.
Need more stories please �

Theres a few spelling and grammatical errors throughout, but it seems to me that the game is original in Korean, so its not that big of a deal. But honestly, some really good stories and a really cool reading experience. Though it should be noted that the stories are pretty short, but they do a great job of impacting you.

If there only were more content...
This is the ultimate way of consuming comics/manga.
